comments.text: Đào Đình Hữu has continued to make strong progress in ESL this term. He has engaged well with topics such as rainforests, animal adaptations, and Ancient Rome and Egypt, and particularly enjoyed the poem about pets and his rainforest fact file. He demonstrates strong comprehension and expresses his ideas clearly in both speaking and writing. To deepen his learning, he should continue practising applying his knowledge in new situations. He should also focus on refining grammar, particularly tenses, “it” and “it's”, and practising gerunds and infinitives. He is a positive and capable student, and I look forward to his continued success.

Đào Đình Hữu has made strong progress in Maths this term and shows good understanding across key topics. He has worked confidently with multiplication and division and has developed his skills in fractions, decimals, ratio and proportion, and area and perimeter. Time, particularly time zone differences and elapsed time, has been more challenging, and we will continue to review this. To further strengthen his learning, he should complete extension tasks regularly to deepen understanding. It is essential that he continues practising his multiplication tables at home, as quick recall supports efficient mental maths and lays the foundation for more advanced mathematical concepts in Grade 5.

Đình Hữu has made very strong progress this semester, demonstrating a secure and confident understanding across a range of scientific topics. He explains processes such as the digestive system clearly and understands the importance of maintaining a balanced diet. He applies his knowledge effectively when planning investigations, selecting appropriate equipment, and presenting results accurately using tables and graphs. He also uses force diagrams confidently to represent different forces and can make thoughtful predictions based on his understanding. His work is consistently accurate, and he approaches tasks with independence and focus. To improve further, he should continue to refine his explanations by adding more detail when evaluating results. Overall, he has had an excellent semester.

Dinh Huu is a bright student and shows great enthusiasm for ICT lessons. However, he can sometimes focus more on finishing quickly rather than producing his best work. He often rushes through tasks in hopes of earning extra free time, which can affect…

general.text: Đình Hữu has shown encouraging progress this term, particularly in his focus and engagement. He is completing his work more consistently and is demonstrating his strong understanding more clearly. His behaviour has improved, and he is showing greater respect towards both teachers and classmates. He is a capable and intelligent student who is beginning to make the most of his abilities. He builds positive relationships with his peers and contributes well to the class when focused. To continue improving, he should maintain this positive behaviour and complete work consistently at home. With continued effort, he is set to make excellent progress.

goals: ESL Target: Continue applying English skills confidently in new situations while refining grammar accuracy. Parents can support through encouraging regular reading, discussion, and independent writing at home. Maths Target: Continue deepening understanding through extension tasks and practise multiplication tables regularly to maintain fluency and confidence. Parents can support through mental maths practice and reasoning discussions. General Goal: Continue working hard, aiming high, and maintaining strong effort in Grade 5 to prepare successfully for checkpoint examinations.

comments.text: Đình Hữu has shown excellent understanding across all science topics this term. He confidently describes the Earth's structure, correctly identifying the core, mantle, and crust, and explains how volcanoes and earthquakes are linked to movements in the crust. His knowledge of animals and habitats is secure, and he gives clear examples of how animals are suited to their environments. He explains how light travels in straight lines and uses ray diagrams accurately to show how we see objects. He names all the planets in the solar system and understands that the Sun is at the centre. His work on conductors and insulators shows strong understanding, especially recognising that metals are good conductors. His enthusiasm and scientific curiosity are a pleasure to see.

Đình Hữu excels in Maths and has made remarkable progress this semester. He confidently compares and orders fractions with different denominators and shows a strong understanding of equivalent fractions. He also performs well in 3D shapes, accurately identifying faces, edges, vertices, and nets. He can interpret charts and diagrams to compare shapes and numbers. Although he was initially inconsistent in showing his working, it's great to see him now doing so regularly and using it to reflect and correct mistakes. His excellent end-of-semester result reflects his strong ability and effort. With continued enthusiasm, Đình Hữu is on a clear path to success. Well done!

Đình Hữu has made good progress in English this semester. He enjoys reading, and shows a great balance between his reading and writing. It has been a pleasure to see his writing develop from simple sentences to well-structured coherent paragraphs. Đình Hữu reads well and comprehends well but he missed some marks in his reading paper due to not paying attention to the needs of the question. To improve his reading score, he needs to continue practicing active reading skills, highlighting the evidence from the text to ensure that no key detail is missed. With continued effort and determination, Đình Hữu is set for continued success in the subject. His end of semester score is a reflection of his hard work.

Đình Hữu maintains a positive attitude in the ICT classroom and interacts respectfully with peers and the teacher. He is an excellent digital citizen, communicating with kindness and respect in online environments. He recognizes how online interactions differ from traditional communication and adjusts his behavior accordingly. His strong understanding of online permanence ensures responsible content sharing. Đình Hữu consistently uses repetition to create clear and concise algorithms, demonstrating a solid grasp of loops. He follows sub-routines easily and applies them strategically to improve his programs' structure. His systematic debugging skills allow him to detect and correct errors efficiently.

general.text: Đình Hữu is a confident learner who has made good progress in expressing his thoughts with clarity. He participates in speaking activities with enthusiasm making insightful contributions. He listens carefully during audio tasks, extracts key information, and organises ideas from audios and texts to write his own sentences. He participates well during group tasks and he is polite and considerate of his group members' contributions. Đình Hữu naturally assumes leadership roles in groupwork and he has produced some remarkable pieces of work with his groups. He takes pride in mentoring less confident learners with compassion. He is kind, thoughtful and always willing to assist with class chores. He is a pleasure to teach!

goals: In English, Đình Hữu is learning to give correct responses in conversation, such as, “Would you like to bake a cake?” – “I'd love to!” To help him improve, please encourage him to use these phrases in daily speaking at home. In Maths, his target is to complete missing numbers in a sequence and carefully check his work for mistakes. In his end-of-semester test, he lost a mark because he forgot to include the negative sign in an answer. Reminding him to review his answers will help him become more accurate and confident.

comments.text: Đình Hữu understands how shadows are made and how they can change in shape and size and is easily able to identify and explain the difference between opaque, translucent and transparent. He knows 4 major organs, their purpose and how they function, and understands food chains and how to draw a food chain. He can explain how fossils are made. He can identify a wide range of common fish, amphibians, reptiles, birds and mammals. He knows what magnetism, friction and gravity are and can name some magnetic materials. In unit 6 we learned about how planets come to be shaped as spheres, we learn more about gravity and we learn all about the moon, including about the phases and movement of the Moon. Đình Hữu participates well in class and often raises his hand to join in with science discussions. He can sometimes be disruptive in class but responds when prompted.

Dinh Huu excels in math. He demonstrates accurate estimation and calculation skills with 3-digit numbers, including addition and subtraction with regrouping. Proficient in the 1-10 times tables, he estimates and performs multiplication and division with minor errors. He understands place value, composing, decomposing, and regrouping numbers. He identifies equivalent fractions and can also compare, order, add, and subtract fractions. He accurately reads time, interprets timetables, measures mass and capacity, identifies symmetry, and compares angles. Dinh Huu records, organizes, and represents data, drawing meaningful conclusions. Additionally, he exhibits a strong understanding of probability, accurately describing events and conducting chance experiments.

Dinh Huu demonstrates proficient progress in his language skills. He effectively understands, summarizes, and deduces meaning with support. Although he rarely engages in class discussions, when he does, Huu is able to ask questions, provide accurate responses, and with support, maintain short exchanges. Dinh Huu displays accurate comprehension of texts, independently deduces meaning, and recognizes the opinions of the writer. In writing, he is capable of writing instructions and is beginning to compose short paragraphs. His handwriting is clear, and he mostly utilizes capitalization, punctuation, and spelling accurately. Dinh Huu effectively plans, writes, and reviews sentences, connecting ideas with basic connectors.

Đình Hữu consistently exhibits exceptional focus and dedication in ICT, resulting in outstanding academic performance. His ability to maintain attention to detail and apply concepts effectively is commendable. With a keen understanding of digital technology, he excels at accessing a diverse range of information sources. His adeptness at utilizing digital tools to explore and evaluate information sets a commendable example for his peers. Đình Hữu shows promise in coding algorithms and utilizing initialization to create a basic storyline with a sprite. Encouraging him to experiment with different block combinations and narrative structures will support his growth in coding proficiency.

general.text: Dinh Huu, a quiet and thoughtful student, has demonstrated remarkable qualities this semester. Despite being introverted, he willingly engages in short conversations with his teacher, showing his willingness to connect and seek guidance. Huu values friendships deeply, maintaining a small circle of close friends. He is learning to navigate social challenges and solve problems positively through communication and empathy. Huu's meticulous nature ensures accuracy in his work, but may lead to delayed completion due to his pursuit of perfection.

goals: This summer, it is important for Dinh Huu to set specific goals to enhance his skills. One goal is to read every day to improve reading fluency and comprehension. Additionally, he should write a short review about the book, expressing his likes and dislikes. He should strive to complete this task with neatness and organization, focusing on clear and legible handwriting, as well as correct spelling. In math, Dinh Huu should prioritize practicing basic operations such as 3-digit addition and subtraction with regrouping, as well as multiplication and division. Furthermore, he should continue to work on telling time and estimating time intervals. It would also be beneficial for him to practice writing and reading 3-digit numbers, while developing a solid understanding of place value.

comments.text: Đình Hữu can describe the simple properties of everyday materials and can suggest how this affects how the materials are used. He can compare animals and describe how different animals grow including their characteristics. He can talk about how animals inherit characteristics from their parents and can identify 3 types of human teeth and describe their function. He can explain the difference between a light source and a reflector and understands that the Earth travels around the sun. Đình Hữu is great at participating and engaging in class and always puts his hand up to take part in science discussions. He does his work when it is time to work and produces good quality work. He generally behaves well and does not try to disrupt the class.

Đào Đình Hữu has natural ability in maths. He has a good understanding of algebra. He can retain his number bonds to 10, 20 and 100. He can perform addition and subtraction of one and two digit numbers. Encourage him to check back over his work when completed as he has a tendency to work fast. Shape and Space: He can read and retain the names and properties of 2D and 3D shapes. Measure: He has a good grasp of length, weight and time and can answer questions in relation to these topics accurately. Data: He can read and respond to bar graphs independently. He performs well in this topic because of his good English literacy skills. Mental Math: His mental maths are of a high standard. Keep up the amazing work.

Đào Đình Hữu is a very capable student. He functioned well this year in an all English environment and followed instructions easily. He interacted well with the curriculum and broadened his range of vocabulary. He displayed a clear understanding and knowledge of content covered in lessons and engaged well with the curriculum. He enjoys reading aloud in lessons and responds to comprehension tasks with good accuracy. He engaged well with written tasks in lessons and is transitioning into a more independent writer. His strong spelling skills have helped him with writing tasks this year. His reading skills are good. He can read and comprehend age appropriate passages and stories. He completes listening tasks in lessons to a high standard. Well done and keep up the super work.

general.text: Đào Đình Hữu is a motivated and independent learner. He listens and follows directions well. He follows classroom rules and is interactive with teachers. He communicates effectively with his classmates and can work in a paired/group setting. He is mannerly and co-operative. He has grown in self confidence and enjoys contributing to classroom conversations. He makes his best effort and enjoys a challenge. He displays a keen interest in math and worked well in this subject. He has well developed problem solving and reasoning skills. Homework assignments were completed to a high standard. I really enjoyed having him in my class this year and I wish him all the best in his future studies.

goals: In preparation for Grade 2: Continue to read for pleasure over the summer holidays. Provide him with opportunities to practise his English speaking skills over summer months. Some creative writing practise would also be beneficial over the holidays. Use Raz-Kids and online resources to continue literacy practise. Math: Learn times tables and review number bonds. Allow him to play math games online to maintain mental math skills over the holidays.
